channel.title: Thailand on TechPawz eSIM - Travel eSIM Plans Compared

item.title: How to Spend a Week in Bangkok: Day-by-Day Travel Planner
item.description:
Photo by Optical Chemist on Pexels

Why Visit Bangkok?
#

Bangkok, the vibrant capital of Thailand, is a city that pulses with energy and culture. Known for its ornate shrines, bustling street life, and rich history, Bangkok is a melting pot of tradition and modernity. From the majestic Grand Palace to the lively markets and street food stalls, there’s something for every type of traveler. The city offers a sensory overload with its colorful sights, tantalizing smells, and the sounds of honking tuk-tuks and street vendors calling out to passersby.
